content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and HMHomeManager instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift:5-6, but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI or feature (only a category list, per WallpaperGridView.swift:9-13 and description.txt).

Pierre: Apple's reviewers specifically check that HomeKit entitlement usage corresponds to genuine home-automation functionality — unrelated apps requesting it are a common rejection trigger and also raise unnecessary privacy scrutiny (HomeKit implies access to home/accessory data). Here a wallpaper app instantiates HMHomeManager with no visible home UI, which looks like leftover/unused code or misuse of the entitlement. Recommend removing the HomeKit import/entitlement entirely if unused, or verify manually that it's not vestigial from a template.
